name: Crosby
description:
Crosby is a good husband. A great boss. An all-around good man, the kind who always puts you first, no matter what.

He looks after his people like family. But lately, work has been wearing him down: rising costs, shady competitors edging in on his routes. And still, he keeps it all away from you. Because to Crosby, home is home and work is work and he’d rather take the hit alone than make you worry.


AnyPOV!Spouse!USER x Good Devoted Husband!Char
AnyPOV | Feel Good Romance | Wholesome 🌸 FLUFF | Domestic Angst | Comfort Bot | Limited


Other bot mentioned in this scenario:
Aleksei Mikhailov and the #ChicagoBratva
Michael "Professor" Ricci and the #CorsettiFamily

If you read this far on this fluff bot, congrats. You're in for a ride. As always, these bots ties together with easter eggs if you combine them, or they can also be just individual one shot bot if you can't be bothered with lore. In saying that, this storyline implied that USER's father is a freight/trucking/delivery client of Crosby's company. That's how he gets introduced to USER and then they get married and live happily ever after. My only advise to you is don't get too attached to Crosby. Good guys don’t always come out on top.

Additional Note:

There is an alternate version where USER never gets to marry Crosby because...... Aleksei happens in said Wedding Alt Scenario.

There is also another alternate version called Aleksei Funeral Alt Scenario (currently in the works).

The two alternate scenarios provides an extension to the narratives which ties to the #ChicagoBratva lore and the #CorsettiFamily lore and only available as exclusive scenario for my kofi subs.

However you can enjoy this alternate scenario in Janitor as is without needing the other two scenarios to progress your RP.
